summary: High‑quality audience transfer that captures a strong New Year's ’88 set highlighted by Jack Straw, Lovelight and Baby Blue.
review: This Neumann‑audiotape sourced from Da Weez/D5scott delivers focused, centered bass and clear mids, far surpassing other transfers of the same show. The performance is praised as the best of the 1988 New Year’s run, with a powerful first‑set close on Jack Straw and an explosive post‑Space second set featuring Lovelight and Baby Blue.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed review rates the show 4 stars, praising both musical moments and sound quality; weighted average yields a strong rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Focused, centered bass with no phase issues; clearer than other transfers (Healy MTX) and sounds crisp throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong first‑set finish with Jack Straw, followed by a powerful post‑Space second set that maintains momentum and showcases tight band interplay.

band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted for delivering an excellent ending on Lovelight.
